UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Wands card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Wands card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Wands card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Wands card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Wands card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Wands card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight Jack Beanstalk's adventurous spirit and the potential for growth symbolized by the sprouting wand.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the salamander or the desert hills, as they may distract from the main themes of exploration and growth.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Page of Wands card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, harp, strings, flutes, percussion, uplifting, optimistic, melodic, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Wands card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Wands card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the mischievous nature of Puck, his pranks, and the chaotic forest environment
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the reversed orientation as it suggests a disruption or obstacle in the Page of Wands' usual creative energy
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Page of Wands card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, harp, strings, flute, reversed, introspective, atmospheric, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Wands card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Wands card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the potential and readiness of young Arthur as he prepares to embark on his journey, with the wand symbolizing his creativity and passion.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the hesitant or uncertain aspects of the image, as this card suggests a sense of readiness and anticipation.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Page of Wands card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, harp, violins, flute, uilleann pipes, ambient, ethereal, hopeful, building, instrumental
